recommendations.job_description_raw:
Internship - Software Engineer Full Stack Internship Opportunity at Axceera – Full-Stack JavaScript Developer (Intern)
Axceera is on the lookout for motivated and results-driven undergraduates or fresh graduates to join our growing team as Full-Stack Software Engineer - Interns. If you’re passionate about building modern web applications using the latest technologies, we want to hear from you!
Join us and gain hands-on experience working on real-world projects while building your career in full-stack development.
- Location:Work from home (Must have a reliable internet connection and personal computer)
- Contract Duration:12 Months
- Hands-on experience with JavaScript (ES6+)
- Familiarity with React.js for frontend development
- Knowledge of Node.js and Express.js for backend services
- Exposure to AWS services (e.g., Lambda, S3, EC2, DynamoDB) is a strong plus
- Understanding of RESTful API integration
- Experience or understanding of databases – SQL (MySQL, PostgreSQL) and/or NoSQL (MongoDB)
- Currently pursuing or completed a Diploma/Degree in IT, Computer Science, or related field
- Strong communication skills in English
- Eagerness to learn, adapt, and grow in a fast-paced environment
- A team player with strong collaboration skills Axceera (Pvt) Ltd Remote

recommendations.job_description_raw:
Intern - Software Engineer Welcome toTwist Digital, where our brand essence revolves around the belief in the transformative power of twisting the fate of businesses. At the core of our values, we are dedicated to unlocking the hidden potential within enterprises and delivering results that bring about positive change.
Our commitment lies in providing a comprehensive digital suite tailored to businesses, empowering them to thrive in the ever-evolving digital landscape. We specialize in unraveling new possibilities, reshaping strategies, and guiding brands toward unprecedented success.
We are seeking a motivated and detail-orientedIntern Software Engineerto join our growing team. The ideal candidate will have a passion for full-stack web development, a strong foundation in modern JavaScript frameworks and libraries (especially ReactJS, NextJS, Node.js, and MongoDB), and a willingness to learn and grow in a fast-paced environment.
Join us in our mission to revolutionize the way businesses approach their digital journey. Whether you are an innovator, a creative mind, or someone passionate about transformative results, Twist Digital is the place for you. Embrace the power of change, unlock your potential, and shape the future with us.
Are you ready to become a Twister? Apply now and be a part of the transformation!
- Assist in developing, maintaining, and optimizing web applications using ReactJS/NextJS (frontend) and Node.js/Express (backend).
- Work with MongoDB to manage and query data for dynamic applications.
- Collaborate with design and development teams to create scalable and responsive user interfaces.
- Troubleshoot and debug application issues to ensure optimal performance and user experience.
- Support in building and integrating RESTful APIs and third-party services.
- Participate in code reviews, team discussions, and sprint planning.
- Stay updated with the latest industry trends, tools, and best practices in web development.
- Basic experience or academic exposure to ReactJS, NextJS, Node.js, Express, and MongoDB.
- Understanding of JavaScript fundamentals, HTML5, and CSS3.
- Familiarity with version control tools such as Git and collaborative platforms like GitHub.
- Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail.
- Ability to work both independently and in a team environment.
- Excellent communication skills and a collaborative mindset.
- Passion for learning new technologies and continuously improving development skills. Twist Digital Colombo, Sri Lanka

Machine Learning Engineer (Intern) We’re looking for a motivatedMachine Learning Engineering Internto support the development of our intelligent task execution engine. You’ll be working at the intersection of backend engineering and applied machine learning, helping us test and optimize how our system performs across hundreds of real-world tasks.
- A current student or recent graduate inComputer Science, AI, or related field.
- Comfortable working withPythonand tools like Jupyter, REST APIs, and basic CLI scripting.
- Curious about howLLMs, agentic workflows, and backend systemsinteract.
- Organized and detail-oriented, especially when handling repetitive test cases.
- Eager to learn from experienced engineers and contribute to an ambitious AI product.
- Familiarity with tools likeLangChain, Playwright, HuggingFace, or OpenAI APIs.
- Experience with task automation or browser scripting.
- Knowledge of prompt engineering or LLM evaluation techniques.
- Deep exposure tohow AI agents work in production.
- Mentorship from senior engineers
- Experience with real-worldtask automation, ML evaluation, and product building.
- Opportunity to grow into a long-term role if there's a fit.
- Letter of recommendation and resume support upon successful completion. Metana Colombo, Sri Lanka

recommendations.job_description_raw:
Pera Industry Day 2026 - Software Engineering Intern About Creative Software:
Founded in 1999, Creative Software is a global technology enabler and pioneer in Sri Lanka’s tech industry. We manage teams of high-performing, dedicated software engineers for our global clientele, providing them with end-to-end software development and maintenance services through team augmentation. We are looking for a passionate and motivated Software Engineering Intern to join our development teams. As an intern, you will gain hands-on experience working on full-stack applications using modern frontend and backend technologies in a professional software engineering environment.
What you can look forward to:
• Work closely with cross-functional engineering teams to develop products, platforms or services
• Collaborate in a scrum team environment adhering to agile software development practices
• Contribute towards solving technical problems and take part in user-story discussions
• Demonstrate analytical thinking and carry out technical research and feasibility study
• Follow Software development best practices and standards
• Gain domain knowledge related to product development
You should have:
• Passion for developing and delivering working software
• Very good understanding of the basic software design principles
• Familiarity with one or more frontend frameworks such as React, Angular, or Vue
• Familiarity with technologies like .NET Core, GoLang, Java, or Python
• Understanding of REST APIs, databases (e.g., SQL Server, PostgreSQL), and CI/CD pipelines
• Exposure to cloud platforms like Azure, AWS, or GCP is highly desirable
• Good foundation in data structures, algorithms, and software engineering principles
• Eagerness to learn new technologies and contribute to real-world projects
• Good communication skills and ability to work collaboratively in a team
What We Offer:
A Creative career offers a flexible working environment, attractive remuneration, and a place to grow and flourish. You will be amongst peers at the top of their game, allowing you to sharpen your skills in an inclusive culture. Our work environment includes a recreation zone and gym to support your mental and physical wellbeing. Creative Software Colombo, Sri Lanka

Intern - Software Engineer AI Swivel Groupheadquartered in Australia is best known for building and implementing custom solutions for businesses to enable them to innovate, scale and compete at a global standard. We've been around since 2019, with a team growing beyond 160+ employees that help us challenge and innovate for our partners across the software, digital, and finance landscapes.
Our Brands: Swivel Tech, Swivel Finance, Swivel Talent, and Swivel Foundation.
Role Description:We are looking for a motivated and curious undergraduate student who is passionate about Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning to join our AI team as an intern. This is an excellent opportunity to gain hands-on experience in real-world AI applications, contribute to ongoing projects, and learn from industry experts.
Key Responsibilities :
Mandatory Skills:
• Knowledge of core software programming concepts such as object-oriented design, algorithm design and data structures
Nice to Have:
Required Attributes:
Engagement
• Internship
Work model
• Hybrid
Benefits
What We Can Offer You:
Work Culture
Swivel promotes a culture of positivity, openness, growth, collaboration, and fairness within our work environment. Individual development matters to us. We put in a sincere effort to help our team grow on professional and personal levels.
Swivel Values
Trust :A confident relationship in our staff, that would adhere to transparency and honesty in our dealings
Innovation :Initiative, collaboration, challenging the industry and continuously evolving
Premium:Top talent, going above and beyond and treating your workplace as your own business
Respect:Everyone matters and so do their ideas
Team:Be supportive, welcoming, community, family-oriented and as strong as our weakest
Our Channels
Website -https://swiveltech.io
Instagram -https://www.instagram.com/swivel.group/
Facebook -https://www.facebook.com/swivelgroupau
LinkedIn -https://www.linkedin.com/company/swivelgroupau/
- Collaborate with the development team to design, develop, test and maintain software applications.

- Write clean, maintainable, efficient, and testable code following best practices.
- Write and conduct unit testing, integration testing, and end-to-end testing to ensure application reliability.
- Stay up-to-date with latest industry trends and technologies.
- Contribute to produce technical documentation.
- Effective interpersonal and communication skills.
- React JS
- Next JS

- Node JS
- Flutter
- Knowledge on Artificial intelligence (AI) and Machine learning (ML)
- Knowledge on Gen AI

recommendations.job_description_raw:
Intern/Junior Quality Assurance Engineer Position: Intern/Junior Quality Assurance Engineer
Responsibilities:
Requirements:
Soft Skills:
Salary: 20,000 LKR - 40000 LKR
Join us in our mission to revolutionize the way businesses approach their digital journey. Whether you are an innovator, a creative mind, or someone passionate about transformative results, Twist Digital is the place for you. Embrace the power of change, unlock your potential, and shape the future with us.
Are you ready to become a Twister? Apply now and be a part of the transformation!
- Assist in creating and executingtest plans, test cases, and test scriptsfor web and mobile applications.
- Perform manual testing to identify bugs, usability issues, and performance bottlenecks.
- Collaborate with developers and designers to ensure consistent quality across features and releases.
- Document and track defects using project management or bug tracking tools like ClickUp or Jira.
- Support in regression testing, cross-browser testing, and user acceptance testing (UAT).
- Contribute to process improvements and QA best practices.
- Stay updated on QA methodologies, tools, and industry trends.
- Help ensure product quality by proactively identifying edge cases and inconsistencies.
- Basic understanding ofsoftware development life cycle (SDLC) and QA methodologies.
- Familiarity with web technologies likePython, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and browser dev tools.
- Experience with bug tracking and project management tools (e.g.,ClickUp, Jira, Trello).
- Exposure to testing on various devices, browsers, and operating systems. Knowledge of basic database concepts andAPI testingis a plus.
- Understanding of automation tools or scripting (e.g.,Selenium, Postman) is a bonus.
- Analytical Thinking:Ability to spot patterns, bugs, and anomalies in complex systems.
- Clear Communication:Report bugs and feedback concisely and collaborate effectively.
- Curiosity & Learning:Eagerness to learn new tools, systems, and testing techniques.
- Attention to Detail:Ensure thorough testing to minimize missed bugs.
- Accountability:Take ownership of assigned tasks and deliver quality output. Twist Digital Remote

recommendations.job_description_raw:
Intern UI/UX Engineer (Hybrid) We are looking for a creative, detail-orientedUI/UX Engineer/Designer – Internto join the Twist Digital team. This role is perfect for someone who loves crafting clean, modern interfaces and designing user experiences that feel smooth, smart, and enjoyable.
As a UI/UX intern, you’ll work closely with product owners, developers, and marketers to design digital products that are not only visually strong—but also user-first, conversion-driven, and built for real-world business outcomes.
Join us in our mission to revolutionize the way businesses approach their digital journey through intelligent automation and AI-driven innovation. Whether you’re an aspiring AI engineer, a curious learner, or someone excited about shaping the future with technology,Twist Digital is the place for you.
Are you ready to become a Twister?Apply now and be a part of the transformation. 🚀
- Assist in designing user interfaces for web and mobile applications.
- Create wireframes, user flows, and prototypes for product features and improvements.
- Support the team in conducting basic user research, collecting feedback, and understanding user behavior.
- Work on UI components, design systems, typography, layout, and spacing consistency.
- Collaborate with developers to ensure designs are implemented accurately and efficiently.
- Contribute to improving user journeys to increase engagement, retention, and conversions.
- Design assets for product landing pages, dashboards, internal tools, or marketing experiences when needed.
- Document design decisions and maintain updated design files for team collaboration.
- Participate in brainstorming sessions and contribute fresh ideas to product and feature design.
- Stay updated with modern UI/UX trends, tools, and best practices.
- Currently pursuing or recently completed a degree/diploma inUI/UX Design, Graphic Design, HCI, Software Engineering, IT, or a related field.
- Familiarity with tools likeFigma, Adobe XD, Sketch, or similar.
- Basic understanding of UX principles such asusability, accessibility, user journeys, and interaction design.
- Ability to create clean and modern UI designs with attention to detail.
- Understanding of responsive design concepts for mobile and desktop layouts.
- Good communication and collaboration skills, and openness to feedback.
- Strong problem-solving mindset and curiosity to learn and improve quickly.
- A portfolio (even small projects, concepts, redesigns) is a plus.
- Experience with basic UX research (surveys, interviews, usability testing).
- Familiarity with design systems and component-based UI thinking.
- Knowledge of motion/interaction design (micro-animations, transitions).
- Basic understanding of how developers work (HTML/CSS concepts are a plus).
- Interest in AI-driven product experiences or intelligent UI patterns. Twist Digital Colombo, Sri Lanka

recommendations.job_description_raw:
Software Engineer - Intern (Web Scraping & Automation) About the Role:
We’re on the hunt for a curious and skilled Software Engineering Intern who canscrape structured and unstructured datafrom any website we provide. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys solving technical puzzles, digging into the web, and automating repetitive tasks.
As an intern, you’ll be an essential part of our tech team—building and maintaining scraping tools, cleaning and structuring datasets, and helping us extract insights that drive real business decisions. You’ll work closely with our team to support internal research, lead generation, and more.
Key Responsibilities:
Requirements:
Good to Have (Not Required):
Think you’ve got what it takes to outsmart the web?Apply now and help us turn the internet into structured data gold.
- Web Scraping:Build and maintain custom scrapers to collect data from various websites—public directories, e-commerce listings, social platforms, and more.
- Automation:Set up tools/scripts to clean and structure scraped data for easy use and analysis.
- Monitoring & Maintenance:Ensure scrapers remain functional despite site layout or structure changes.
- Collaboration:Work with product, research, and business teams to understand data needs and deliver clean outputs.
- Documentation:Clearly document scraping processes, scripts, and any workarounds used.
- Proficient inPythonand libraries likeBeautifulSoup, Selenium, Scrapy, or Playwright.
- Understanding ofHTML, CSS, and JavaScriptto navigate dynamic websites.
- Experience working withAPIs,JSON, anddata storage(CSV, MongoDB, or SQL).
- Familiarity withanti-bot mechanismsand how to bypass CAPTCHAs, rate limits, or blocked IPs (bonus).
- Fluent in English with clear written and verbal communication.
- Self-starter mindset with strong problem-solving skills.
- GitHub experience and comfortable with collaborative coding workflows.
- Experience with headless browsers (e.g., Puppeteer or Playwright).
- Knowledge of proxy management and rotating user agents.
- Basic data analysis or visualization skills (e.g., Pandas, Jupyter, or Excel). Zyner.io Remote
